message:
Add user segment to session and subagent routes

URLs now include the user slug: /sessions/{user}/{project}/{sessionId}
and /api/subagent/{user}/{project}/{sessionId}/{agentId}. This matches
the dir_id format (user/project) used in the multi-user DB schema.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
